---
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

```

::: {.panel-tabset .nav-pills}

# Parole Eligibility

::: {.panel-tabset .tab2}

### Race and Ethnicity

### Gender

:::


# Population 

## Time Served



:::
